creator: soil@quick.net
text:
Version 2.9alpha1 of the ircII internet relay chat client is now
available at ftp://ircii.warped.com/pub/ircII/ircII-current.tar.gz.
The ports collection should be updated to this version.

Fix: Apply this diff file to ports/net/ircII. Note that patch-ac is no longer
needed and is removed.
